Add(string, object)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

Name string
Value object

AddDoubleEx(string, double, int)

Adds new member name-value pair to the member collection. Stores precision for use in ToJSON and ToJSONString. Returns E_FAIL if duplicate member is found.

virtual void AddDoubleEx(string Name, double Value, int precision)

Parameters

Name string
Value double
precision int

Sample Snippet

CaseSensitiveNames

Returns true if member name lookups are case-sensitive. Default value is true. Methods affected by this state change: MemberExists, IsValueNull and all TryGet... methods.

virtual bool CaseSensitiveNames { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClearAll()

Removes all members.

virtual void ClearAll()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsValueNull(string)

Returns VARIANT_TRUE if member is undefined or member's value is null. Returns VARIANT_FALSE if member exists and its value is not null.

virtual bool IsValueNull(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

bool

TryGetValue(string, out object)

Returns member value for a given name. If member does not exist, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValue(string Name, out object Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value object

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsArray(string, out IJSONArray)

Returns member value for a given name as IJSONArray. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsArray(string Name, out IJSONArray Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value IJSONArray

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsBoolean(string, out bool)

Returns member value for a given name as boolean. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsBoolean(string Name, out bool Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value bool

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsDate(string, out DateTime)

Returns member value for a given name as DATE. If member does not exist or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsDate(string Name, out DateTime Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value DateTime

Returns

bool

Parameters

Value double

bool

TryGetValueAsUInt64(string, ref ulong)

virtual bool TryGetValueAsUInt64(string Name, ref ulong Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value ulong

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsVariant(string, int, out object)

Returns member value for a given name as a VARIANT of the requested type. If member does not exist, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

virtual bool TryGetValueAsVariant(string Name, int variantType, out object Value)

Parameters

Name string
variantType int
Value object

Returns

bool
